What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

power skating camps, small private group sessions, private 1 on 1 lessons, For more information about our elite skating academy, feel free to reach out at 401-829-7967 or contact our experienced skating coach near me at sara@rieliteskatingacademy.net

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One board for every power skating inquiry — camp, clinic, or private 1-on-1 — so nothing gets lost between your phone, inbox, and WhatsApp.
  • Assign the right coach (Jeremy, Ethan, Maleah, Ellen, or Allison) to each session in-view, with skater notes and hockey-club affiliation (Vikings, Broncos) already loaded.
  • See the whole season — power skating camps, clinics, and private lessons — at a glance, with tryout/evaluation windows and re-enrollment prompts built in.
